blockingIssues.description: The actions-page test suite still does not import or render ActionsPage and remains helper-only in node/no-DOM mode, so required component behavior coverage for VAL-UI-014 is still unmet.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add a feature-assignment rule that fix features should use the domain-matching worker skill (frontend-worker for client/UI changes, backend-worker for server/storage changes). If assignment intentionally mismatches, require explicit skillFeedback deviations.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Feature fix-phase2-ui-scrutiny-issues was assigned backend-worker but changed only client/src/* and shared/types/actions.ts, and the handoff marked followedProcedure=true despite backend-worker-only steps being inapplicable.

rejectedObservations.observation: frontend-worker procedure should require explicit agent-browser validation/documented exemptions.
UI contract asks for component tests but current Vitest setup is node-only without DOM tooling.
backend-worker RED-first flow lacks a declaration-only exception path.
Implementation commits should avoid unrelated .factory artifact files.
